name: X (Twitter)

specs.engagement_focus: Retweets and Replies are key for viral reach
specs.hashtag_logic: Must use trending hashtags or 'Branded Hashflags'

platform_exclusive_logic.Art_Showcase: Post high-resolution character illustrations (Ichimai-e) that fans want to save/wallpaper.
platform_exclusive_logic.The_Poll_Hook: Use 'Polls' to let users vote on the next character skin or game feature.

psychological_hooks: Information Superiority: 'First look at the new SSR!'
Social Connection: Tagging friends to join a 'Pre-registration' campaign for collective rewards.
The 'News' Angle: Presenting the game update as a 'Breaking News' flash.
